name: radiotherapy-workflow-system
description: Desktop radiotherapy workflow management system with an AI customization assistant.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron electron/main.cjs"
scripts.package: npm run test && npm run build && python scripts/build_portable.py
